ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "setup_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test setup */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the channel in the test setup */,
  "adc_uv" REAL /* ADC voltage reading in microvolts */,
  "adc_te" REAL /* Temperature effect on ADC reading */,
  "adc_ss" REAL /* Signal stability of ADC reading */,
  "pa0_mv" REAL /* Power supply voltage on PA0 in millivolts */,
  "pa1_mv" REAL /* Power supply voltage on PA1 in millivolts */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who conducted the test */,
  "test_batch_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the test batch */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in minutes */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., passed, failed, ongoing) */,
  "test_remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or notes about the test */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the test (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_setup_id FOREIGN KEY ("setup_id") REFERENCES test_setups ("setup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_setups" (
  "setup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test setup */,
  "setup_name" TEXT /* Name of the test setup */,
  "setup_description" TEXT /* Description of the test setup */,
  "setup_configuration" TEXT /* Configuration details of the test setup */,
  "setup_location" TEXT /* Location where the test setup is located */,
  "setup_created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test setup was created */,
  "setup_type" TEXT /* Type of the test setup (e.g., ADC, temperature, power supply) */,
  "setup_vendor" TEXT /* Vendor or manufacturer of the test setup */,
  "setup_model" TEXT /* Model of the test setup */,
  "setup_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the test setup */,
  "setup_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration of the setup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "setup_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test setup */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "channel_description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of the channel (e.g., ADC, Power Supply) */,
  "channel_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the channel */,
  "channel_range_min" REAL /* Minimum range of the channel */,
  "channel_range_max" REAL /* Maximum range of the channel */,
  "channel_tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance level of the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the operator (e.g., engineer, QA) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the operator belongs to */,
  "operator_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the operator */,
  "operator_position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the operator */,
  "operator_employment_date" TEXT /* Date the operator was employed */,
  "operator_status" TEXT /* Current status of the operator (e.g., active, on leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test log */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test being logged */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the test */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the test */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  "log_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test log in minutes */,
  "log_environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the log (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "log_equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  "config_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the configuration setting */,
  "config_min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the configuration setting */,
  "config_max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the configuration setting */,
  "config_tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance level for the configuration setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_configurations_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_environment" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the version */,
  "version_equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the version */,
  "version_remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_versions_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "doc_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "doc_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., report, log) */,
  "doc_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "doc_version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "doc_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "doc_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_documents_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, approve) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "audit_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the audit action in minutes */,
  "audit_environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the audit */,
  "audit_equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_audits_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the test */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of the approval */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the approval (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the approver */,
  "approval_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the approval process in minutes */,
  "approval_environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the approval */,
  "approval_equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_approvals_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_approvals_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "to_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., alert, reminder) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the notification in minutes */,
  "notification_environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the notification */,
  "notification_equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_notifications_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_notifications_to_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_user_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)
